headline: What SpaceX's expanded Starlink coverage means for the IPO
summary: SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) has expanded Starlink's coverage with a new partnership with US Mobile. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian goes over the details.

headline: Verizon Shares Rise 20.6% in Three Months: How to Play the Stock
summary: VZ rides fiber growth, Frontier deal and bundling push to drive gains, but rising costs, fierce telecom competition and heavy spending weigh on margins.

headline: Nvidia Pushes Telcos Into AI Era With New Grid Vision
summary: Nvidia deepens telecom push with its AI Grid model, but analysts say monetization remains the key test for telcos.
